vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, evening strolls with my grandparents were a sacred ritual in our household.

vocab.meaning: sự khám phá không có người lớn đi kèm
vocab.example: In that era, parents were more comfortable allowing children a degree of unaccompanied exploration around the block.

vocab.meaning: nhịp độ thong thả, chậm rãi
vocab.example: We would often wander at a leisurely pace, stopping to inspect every interesting insect or flower we found.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại những kỷ niệm đẹp
vocab.example: Thinking about those sunset walks always helps to rekindle fond memories of a simpler, tech-free childhood.
Our backyard opened onto a small woodland, giving me ample opportunity to commune with nature on a daily basis.
As a child with boundless energy, a simple walk often turned into a series of sprints and jumps.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo điều kiện cho (thói quen sau này)
vocab.example: Those early outdoor excursions helped pave the way for my current passion for hiking and mountaineering.
Walking to the local grocery store for a treat was the quintessential experience of my summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò kỳ quặc/ngây ngô
vocab.example: Every walk was fueled by a whimsical curiosity that made even the most mundane alleyway feel like a labyrinth.
We would frequently head to the park just to bask in the sun and watch the world go by.
